description:
The Open Source Alternative To Notion.

AppFlowy is an open source alternative to Notion.
You are in charge of your data and customizations.
Version 0.11.8 – 24/04/2026
Desktop
New Features
- Added AI Meeting transcript language support for Spanish, German, French, Italian, and Portuguese
- Added default AI transcript language setting on Settings page
- Revamped Find and Replace menu with improved search navigation and replace actions
- Improved background document and database syncing, including recent view sync and database cache persistence
Bug Fixes
- Fixed duplicated row documents, database blocks, linked databases, inline databases, and subpages not preserving content or filters correctly
- Fixed cached filter results and multi-view checkbox filters in databases
- Fixed board auto-group behavior and empty database group display states
- Fixed possible document data loss when closing a document quickly
- Fixed the current subpages of the selected page becoming invisible when collapsing all subpages
- Fixed text selection issue when Table of Contents is collapsed
- Fixed slash menu, popup menu, bulk toolbar, settings icon, and space button UI issues
- Fixed desktop window bounds not being restored correctly on startup after resizing on a secondary monitor
Mobile
New Features
- Added the new Find and Replace menu on mobile, including search navigation and replace actions
- Improved database loading and cache persistence for mobile database views
- Improved background document and database syncing, including recent view sync and database cache persistence
Bug Fixes
- Fixed duplicated row documents and database blocks not preserving content correctly
- Fixed duplicated linked and inline databases not preserving filters correctly
- Fixed duplicated database views producing broken or misplaced copies
- Fixed mobile database row duplication context issues
